package rulecoverage

func PositiveHttpClientAllocatedPerCallWithoutReuse() string {
    ruleID := "http_client_allocated_per_call_without_reuse"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "http.Client literals allocated on regular call paths instead of being reused as shared client state."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
